debug_info.goal:
tab : Table
tab_valid : tab.Valid
row : Row
row_valid : Valid tab row
y : ValidSplit tab row
⊢ ¬∃ q ∈ row.toPoseInterval, RupertPose q nopert.hull

failed_attempts: y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid) tab_valid

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.h_union hq with
    | inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.left y.valid_left ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.right y.valid_right ⟨q, h, hr⟩
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    match y.h_subset hq with
    | .inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.i₁) ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | .inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.i₂) ⟨q, h, hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases row.mem_split y.i hq with
    | inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right ⟨q, h, hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.h hq with
    | inl h1 => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.r1 y.v1 ⟨q, h1, hr⟩
    | inr h2 => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.r2 y.v2 ⟨q, h2, hr⟩
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)

intro ⟨q, hq, hqr⟩
    cases y.h_mem hq with
    | inl hqL => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.left) ⟨q, hqL, hqr⟩
    | inr hqR => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.right) ⟨q, hqR, hqr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hqR⟩
    cases y.h_union hq with
    | inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.i1) ⟨q, h, hqR⟩
    | inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ (tab_valid y.i2) ⟨q, h, hqR⟩
y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert fun r hr => valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid r (y.h_valid r hr)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.h_union hq with
    | inl h1 => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.r1 y.v1 ⟨q, h1, hr⟩
    | inr h2 => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.r2 y.v2 ⟨q, h2, hr⟩
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h1) (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h2)
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h₁) (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h₂)
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid
exact y.valid_imp_not_rupert tab_valid
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)

intro ⟨q, hq, hrupert⟩
    cases y.toPoseInterval_subset hq with
    | inl hql => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left_valid ⟨q, hql, hrupert⟩
    | inr hqr => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right_valid ⟨q, hqr, hrupert⟩
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    match y.h_union hq with
    | .inl hL => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.left_valid ⟨q, hL, hr⟩
    | .inr hR => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.right_valid ⟨q, hR, hr⟩
y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.h_split hq with
    | inl h => exact tab_valid y.i1 ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | inr h => exact tab_valid y.i2 ⟨q, h, hr⟩
y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert tab_valid (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)
exact y.not_rupert (valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid)

by
      intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
      match y.h_union hq with
      | .inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h_l ⟨q, h, hr⟩
      | .inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h_r ⟨q, h, hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    cases y.h_union hq with
    | inl hl => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.left y.v_left ⟨q, hl, hr⟩
    | inr hr' => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid y.right y.v_right ⟨q, hr', hr⟩

intro ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    match y.h_split.mem_or hq with
    | .inl h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h_left ⟨q, h, hr⟩
    | .inr h => exact valid_imp_not_rupert tab tab_valid _ y.h_right ⟨q, h, hr⟩
